common.errorHint: We couldn't complete this request. Please check your connection and try again.
common.offline: You are offline — showing the last saved data.

home.heroTitle: Turn weather data into a survival plan.
home.heroSubtitle: MonsoonMitra reasons over live weather and your household to tell you what to actually do — before, during, and after the storm.
home.feature1Body: A plan built for your floor, your family, your medical needs — not a generic checklist.
home.feature2Body: Every number is a live Open-Meteo reading; every plan is a live AI response.
home.feature3Body: English, Hindi, Marathi, Tamil — with voice input for everyone.

onboarding.title: Set up your household
onboarding.medicalNotes: Anything else we should know (conditions, medicines)

dashboard.title: Weather guidance
dashboard.noProfile: Set up your household to get personalized guidance.

plan.title: Your preparedness plan
plan.needProfile: We need your household profile to build a plan.

checklist.title: Emergency checklist
checklist.subtitle: Generate a checklist in seconds — no full sign-up needed.

travel.title: Travel advisory
travel.needOrigin: Please set your starting location (From) first.
travel.needDestination: Please choose a destination (To) to get an advisory.

chat.title: Safety assistant
chat.welcome: Namaste! I'm your monsoon safety assistant. Ask me anything about staying safe this season.
chat.emergencyNote: In an active emergency, call 112 immediately.

community.title: Community hazard map
community.localOnly: Local-only mode: these reports are visible only on this device. Configure Firebase to share with the community.
community.noReports: No hazards reported nearby yet. Be the first to help your neighbours.
community.useMyLocation: Use my location for the pin

recovery.title: Post-event recovery
recovery.subtitle: After the storm passes, re-enter and recover safely.
recovery.mentalHealth: It's normal to feel shaken after a flood. Rest, reach out to family, and seek support if distress persists.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.denied: Notifications blocked in your browser settings.
alerts.none: No alerts yet. We're monitoring the weather for you.

errors.noGroqKey: AI features need a Groq API key. Add VITE_GROQ_API_KEY to your .env file.
errors.locationDenied: Location access was denied. Please search for your city instead.
errors.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. You can still type your question.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to sync your household plan, alerts and reports across devices.
auth.guestHint: Guest data stays on this device only.
auth.needFirebase: Google sign-in needs Firebase config. Add your VITE_FIREBASE_* keys to .env and enable Google in the Firebase console. You can continue as a guest meanwhile.
auth.loginToView: Sign in to view your profile and history.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.noHistory: No activity yet. Your generated plans, checklists and reports will appear here.
